g.text: AND | LBP = 20 | left-assoc | tighter than OR
NOT | RBP = 25 | unary-prefix | between AND and =
Loop | while LBP(peek) > min_bp — consume op and recurse
Parse Trace — a OR b AND NOT c = d
Final AST: OR( a, AND( b, NOT( EQ( c, d ) ) ) )
peek tok | NOT — unary prefix operator
